effectiveDate.description: Effective date for the stock certificate

quantity.description: Quantity of shares for the stock certificate

issuePrice.description: Issue price (a.k.a. strike price) for the stock certificate

boardApprovalDate.description: Board approval date for the stock certificate (if not supplied, the certificate will be created with an unapproved status)

vestingStartDate.description: Vesting base or commencement date for the vesting schedule

manualVestingRows.description: List of all manual vesting rows for the stock certificate, specified when using a manual vesting schedule
